description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a mix of wood and white exterior finishes. The structure includes two distinct levels, with the upper story partially cantilevered over the lower level, creating a striking geometric profile. Large windows are set into the wooden facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property includes a spacious outdoor area with a rectangular swimming pool, a paved driveway, and a pergola-covered patio. The flat roof and open terrace spaces enhance the modern appeal, while the use of natural materials adds warmth. The overall layout is open and inviting, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, wood and white finishes, large windows, a pool, and a pergola patio.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wood-clad lower level, three large windows, and the pergola-covered patio area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the cantilevered upper story, flat roof, and the driveway extending alongside the house.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the pool, open terrace, and the geometric intersection of the house's volumes.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entryway, pergola, pool, and the open, inviting layout of the outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway under a pergola with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalist door design
